Description: Brother and sister, Hansel (Jeremy Renner) and Gretel (Gemma Arterton), are the ultimate witch-hunting vigilantes. Now, unknown to them, they have become the hunted and must face a greater evil than witches: their past.

Subject: Underworld (2003)
Description: A female vampire tries to protect a medical student from werewolves intent on creating a hybrid species.

Subject: Demolition Man (1993)
Description: The police must thaw a long-imprisoned ex-officer to help catch an escaped convict in 2032 San Angeles.

Subject: Law & Order - Strike
Description: When a legal aid striker is killed outside the courthouse, the sand in his wounds leads detectives to investigate a greensman; due to the strike and shortage of defense attorneys, Rubirosa and Cutter must face each other in court.

Subject: Law & Order - Personae Non Grata
Description: The murder of an automobile mechanic leads detectives to uncover a fraudulent online relationship, a bizarre case of blackmail and money laundering.

Subject: Law & Order - Excalibur
Description: The murder of a jeweler leads detectives to an illegal prostitution ring; Jack McCoy's job is threatened.

Subject: Law & Order - Rumble
Description: The beating death of a stockbroker causes a battle of epic proportions between the victim's family and the faction responsible for his death.

Subject: Law & Order - Challenged
Description: A mentally challenged man is reunited with his mother, who gave him away after his brother was killed.

Subject: Law & Order - Lost Boys
Description: A young woman (guest star Jena Malone) escapes from a polygamous cult.

Subject: Law & Order - Falling
Description: A crane collapse kills a man, and it may not have been an accident; a rift forms between Jack McCoy and Michael Cutter.

Subject: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet - Summer
Description: It is high summer in the polar regions, and the sun never sets; many species take advantage of the easier conditions, but summer is a tough time for the polar bear family, as their ice world melts away and the cubs take their first swimming lesson.

Subject: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet - Autumn
Description: Polar landscapes in autumn are transformed as the big freeze returns; in the Arctic, polar bears gather in large numbers on the coast to wait for the return of the ice; off the coast 2,000 beluga whales head for a special estuary.

Subject: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet - The Last Frontier
Description: Human survival in polar areas relies on ancient wisdom and modern science; a look at the riches and wonders of the polar regions and the people that have been visiting them for thousands of years.

Subject: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet - Winter
Description: Winter is the greatest test for life in the polar regions; in the Arctic, a female polar bear treks into the mountains to give birth; out on the frozen ocean, the entire population of the world's spectacled eider ducks braves the winter.

Subject: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet - Spring
Description: Spring in the polar regions; the greatest seasonal transformation of the planet begins with the return of the sun.

Subject: Underworld (2003)
Description: A female vampire tries to protect a medical student from werewolves intent on creating a hybrid species.

Subject: Demolition Man (1993)
Description: The police must thaw a long-imprisoned ex-officer to help catch an escaped convict in 2032 San Angeles.

Subject: First Blood (1982)
Description: Green Beret veteran Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) takes on a Pacific Northwest sheriff (Brian Dennehy) and the National Guard.

Subject: Rambo: First Blood Part II (1985)
Description: A former Green Beret goes on a reconnaissance mission to spring MIAs from a Viet Cong prison.

Subject: Rambo III (1988)
Description: Former Special Forces agent John Rambo blasts through Soviet-occupied Afghanistan in search of his captive mentor.

Subject: Criminal Minds - North Mammon
Description: The BAU looks to outsiders for clues when three college athletes disappear the night of a pep rally; J.J. is instrumental in moving the case forward.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Empty Planet
Description: The unit is called into action when a serial bomber terrorizes Seattle.

Subject: Criminal Minds - The Last Word
Description: The daughter of high-powered diplomats must battle suspicions of nepotism when her assignment to the unit takes place without notification to Hotch or Gideon.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Lessons Learned
Description: The BAU goes to Guantanamo Bay to interrogate the leader of a terrorist sleeper-cell to prevent a national disaster.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Sex, Birth, Death
Description: Dr. Spencer Reid suspects that a young man who has reached out to him for help may be a serial killer.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Profiler, Profiled
Description: The BAU team must delve into Morgan's past to prove his innocence when he is arrested on a charge of murder in Chicago.

Subject: Criminal Minds - No Way Out
Description: The BAU team goes head-to-head with a serial killer (Keith Carradine) who has tortured and killed more than 100 people over 30 years.

Subject: Hidden Habitats - The Secret to Their Success
Description: External skeletons of insects provide strength and protection, and their diminutive stature allows them to exploit all habitats.

Subject: Planet Earth: Life - Birds
Description: Birds can fly at high speeds and cover great distances, but also can show murderous tendencies.

Subject: Planet Earth: Life - Insects
Description: The world's most diverse animal group, insects possess fearsome weapons but also show tenderness.

Subject: Planet Earth: Life - Hunters and Hunted
Description: Explore the battles fought daily between carnivores and their prey around the world.

Subject: Planet Earth: Life - Creatures of the Deep
Description: An investigation of marine invertebrates and the way they thrive in the toughest parts of the ocean; divers swim into a shoal of predatory Humboldt squid as the creatures emerge from the depths to hunt in packs.

Subject: Sniper (1993)
Description: A lone Marine sharpshooter (Tom Berenger) goes on a Panama mission with a Washington bureaucrat (Billy Zane) accustomed to paper targets.

Subject: First Blood (1982)
Description: Green Beret veteran Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) takes on a Pacific Northwest sheriff (Brian Dennehy) and the National Guard.

Subject: Rambo: First Blood Part II (1985)
Description: A former Green Beret goes on a reconnaissance mission to spring MIAs from a Viet Cong prison.

Subject: Rambo III (1988)
Description: Former Special Forces agent John Rambo blasts through Soviet-occupied Afghanistan in search of his captive mentor.

Subject: Road House (1989)
Description: Hired to tame a rowdy Missouri bar, a Ph.D. bouncer (Patrick Swayze) romances a doctor (Kelly Lynch) and tames the whole town.

Subject: NCIS - Good Wives Club
Description: Gibbs and his team investigate when the decomposed body of a woman in a wedding dress is found in a subterranean cell decorated to resemble a 1950s bedroom.

Subject: NCIS - Vanished
Description: When a Marine helicopter appears in the middle of a crop circle, Gibbs and the team investigate and encounter a town convinced that extraterrestrials played a role.

Subject: NCIS - Lt. Jane Doe
Description: The team investigates a Navy lieutenant's rape and murder; Ducky fears the killer is linked to an unsolved murder that has been haunting him for years.

Subject: NCIS - The Bone Yard
Description: The discovery of a civilian's body in a Marine bombing range leads the team to uncover a Mafia dumping ground, and Gibbs' partner, agent Fornell (Joe Spano), is accused of aiding the Mafia.

Subject: NCIS - Terminal Leave
Description: The NCIS team's assignment is to protect an Iraqi War veteran being targeted by terrorists.

Subject: NCIS - Call of Silence
Description: A World War II Medal of Honor recipient (Charles Durning) confesses to the murder of his best friend almost 60 years ago.

Subject: The Three Stooges - If a Body Meets a Body
Description: Curly is mentioned in a will.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Men in Black
Description: The Stooges become doctors at a large hospital, where they disrupt patients and staff alike.

Subject: Bones - The High in the Low
Description: The remains of a former art student are found in a log in a forest; Wendell returns after beginning cancer treatments; Booth prepares for an FBI competency test.

Subject: Bones - The Cold in the Case
Description: The team investigates the death of a woman whose body was cryogenically frozen before being dumped in a swamp; Cam is nervous to meet Arastoo's parents; Booth is up for a promotion.

Subject: Bones - The Nail in the Coffin
Description: When the remains of a woman from a wealthy family are found in a national park, the team thinks she may be a victim of the Ghost Killer; Booth's career might be in for some changes.

Subject: Bones - The Drama in the Queen
Description: When the head swim coach of a community college is found dead at the bottom of the well, possible suspects think he may have been having an affair; a new intern (Laura Spencer) catches Sweets' attention.

Subject: The Outsiders (1983)
Description: In 1960s Oklahoma a sensitive youth (C. Thomas Howell) gets in over his head when his best friend (Ralph Macchio) kills a member of a rival gang.

Subject: Rocky Balboa (2006)
Description: Retired Rocky's (Sylvester Stallone) plan to re-enter the ring for a few small matches escalates into a full-fledged bout with the world's reigning heavyweight.

Subject: Road House (1989)
Description: Hired to tame a rowdy Missouri bar, a Ph.D. bouncer (Patrick Swayze) romances a doctor (Kelly Lynch) and tames the whole town.

Subject: Law & Order - Knock Off
Description: A revered sheriff becomes a possible conspirator in a case involving a murdered tourist.

Subject: Law & Order - Sweetie
Description: Detectives Lupo and Bernard investigate when the writer of a best-selling memoir is found dead in a community of male prostitutes.

Subject: Law & Order - Zero
Description: Cutter is determined to expose misconduct when he realizes an old friend working in the system is obstructing justice in the murder of an environmentalist.

Subject: Law & Order - Chattel
Description: While investigating the murder of two divorce lawyers, detectives Lupo and Bernard uncover a child slave-trade ring.

Subject: Law & Order - By Perjury
Description: The murder of the plaintiff in a high-profile lawsuit against a major airline leads detectives to a defense attorney (Dallas Roberts) who is willing to do whatever it takes to ensure his big payday.

Subject: Law & Order - Pledge
Description: When the son and housekeeper of a pair of prominent biologists are murdered, detectives suspect the couple's work on a controversial pharmaceutical study may have made them targets for the killer.

Subject: Law & Order - Lucky Stiff
Description: The owner of a trucking company, Vic Russell, is found dead after a business meeting; detectives uncover information that leads them to believe that Russell had ties to the Russian mob.

Subject: Law & Order - Illegitimate
Description: An NYPD officer kills a troubled fellow officer who took hostages at gunpoint; detectives Lupo and Bernard find valuable stolen documents and a dead body at the man's apartment.

Subject: Law & Order - Crimebusters
Description: An unconscious war widow and her lifeless infant are found in the rubble of a bombed Army recruitment center; DA Jack McCoy must make one of the most-unpopular decisions of his career.

Subject: Law & Order - Rapture
Description: Mysterious e-mails from a religious Web site lead detectives to the dead body of one of the page's creators; Jack McCoy's political opponent uses the media to attack his reputation.

Subject: Law & Order - Bailout
Description: As detectives investigate the death of a bank executive's mistress, they uncover a kidnapping and extortion plot.

Subject: Law & Order - Take-Out
Description: The search for a writer's killer leads detectives to a closed espionage case.

Subject: The Equalizer (2014)
Description: A man who believes he has put his mysterious past behind him cannot stand idly by when he meets a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters.

Subject: College Basketball - North Carolina A&T at Hampton

Subject: NFL Football - San Francisco 49ers at Seattle Seahawks
Description: The Seahawks (14-3) host the 49ers (12-5) in the NFC Divisional Round. Seattle secured the No. 1 seed, while the 49ers advanced after an upset win over the Eagles. Seahawks won the most recent showdown 13-3 against the 49ers to clinch the NFC West.

Subject: NFL Football - Buffalo Bills at Denver Broncos
Description: The Broncos battle against the Bills at Empower Field at Mile High. Denver's Bo Nix is the fourth QB in franchise history to lead the team to No. 1 seed. Buffalo's James Cook had 15 carries for 46 yards in the Wild Card win in his previous game.

Subject: NFL Football - Buffalo Bills at Denver Broncos
Description: The Broncos battle against the Bills at Empower Field at Mile High. Denver's Bo Nix is the fourth QB in franchise history to lead the team to No. 1 seed. Buffalo's James Cook had 15 carries for 46 yards in the Wild Card win in his previous game.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Ole Miss at Georgia
Description: No. 16 Ole Miss meets Georgia at Stegeman Coliseum. The Rebels' Cotie McMahon has scored in double figures in every game this season. Georgia tries to avoid a three-game skid behind guard Dani Carnegie as the Lady Bulldogs return to home court.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Tennessee at Alabama
Description: No. 20 Tennessee visits No. 21 Alabama as Talaysia Cooper and Kaniya Boyd return from injury. Cooper averages 14.9 points per game for the Lady Volunteers, while Jessica Timmons leads the Crimson Tide with 15.4 points per game in the SEC matchup.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Texas A&M at Texas
Description: The No. 4 Texas Longhorns host the Texas A&M Aggies at the Moody Center for SEC play. Junior forward Madison Booker is an All-American candidate, leading the team with 19.2 PPG. A&M is searching for consistency after a 91-51 loss to Vanderbilt.

Subject: College Football - Cheez-It Citrus Bowl: Michigan vs. Texas
Description: Storied programs in the No. 13 Longhorns and the No. 18 Wolverines line up in the Citrus Bowl from Orlando, Fla. Both sides are 9-3. The schools meet for the third time after the Longhorns defeated the Wolverines 31-12 in 2024.

Subject: College Basketball - Missouri at LSU
Description: Missouri visits LSU at Pete Maravich Assembly Center for an SEC game. LSU looks to Dedan Thomas Jr., who averages 16.2 PPG, to end a three-game skid. Missouri aims to bounce back from a loss to Ole Miss. Both teams look for a key conference win.

Subject: College Basketball - South Carolina at Auburn
Description: Keyshawn Hall leads Auburn against South Carolina at Neville Arena. The Tigers look to utilize Keyshawn Hall's 21.7 PPG scoring average against a Gamecocks defense led by Mike Sharavjamts (5.8 RPG) in a high-stakes SEC Saturday showdown.

Subject: College Basketball - Texas A&M at Texas

Subject: College Basketball - Arkansas at Georgia
Description: The No. 17 Razorbacks travel to Athens to take on the No. 21 Bulldogs. Georgia's Somtochukwu Cyril has been a revelation, averaging 2.9 blocks and 6.1 rebounds per game. Arkansas' Darius Acuff Jr. is one of the nation's premier scorers with 19.9 PPG.

Subject: College Football - SEC Championship: Georgia vs. Alabama
Description: The No. 9 Crimson Tide (10-2) and No. 3 Bulldogs (11-1) meet in the SEC championship game for the third time in five years. Alabama is 4-0 against Georgia in SEC title contests. The Bulldogs yielded a total of 22 points in the last three outings.

Subject: Women's College Volleyball - NCAA Tournament: Texas A&M vs. Kentucky

Subject: College Basketball - Ole Miss at Mississippi State

Subject: College Football - LSU at Oklahoma
Description: The No. 8 Sooners (9-2, 5-2 SEC) surge into a regular-season finale with the Tigers (7-4, 3-4). Oklahoma has won three straight games, all against Top 25 teams, and would all but assure itself a spot in the College Football Playoff by beating LSU.

Subject: Giant Killers: The Story of the Lady Longhorns
Description: The story of Title IX's impact on the University of Texas, with a spotlight on its first director of women's athletics, Donna Lopiano; driven by the spirit of Title IX, Lopiano's legacy has paved the way for female athletes in Austin and beyond.

Subject: Decade of Dominance
Description: A commemorative look at the 10-year anniversary of the College Football Playoff that highlights the SEC's success across the last decade. During that time, the SEC earned 12 CFP appearances and six National Championships -- the most of any league.
